User.title: User
User.description: A user of the collaborative task board.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

username.description: The unique username of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

completedCount.description: The number of tasks the user has completed.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

lastActive.description: When the user was last active.

id.description: The unique ID of the comment.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the comment.

userName.description: The name of the user who created the comment.

userPhotoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A message in the global chat.

id.description: The unique ID of the message.

userId.description: The ID of the user who sent the message.

userName.description: The name of the user who sent the message.

userPhotoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

id.description: The unique ID of the task.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the task.

userName.description: The name of the user who created the task.

dueDate.description: The due date of the task.

completedBy.description: The ID of the user who completed the task.

completedByName.description: The name of the user who completed the task.

updatedAt.description: When the task was last updated.

/chats/{chatId}.description: The collection of global chat messages.
